# synthetics_create_client_certificate_v2 (Resource)

Manages a Synthetics client certificate for mTLS authentication. Client certificates are authentication material for synthetic tests. They are separate from CA certificates used as SSL trust material. Client certificate public key content, private key content, and private key password are stored in Terraform state when managed by this resource. Use encrypted, access-controlled remote state and do not commit Terraform state files or certificate material. API reads return certificate material redacted; imports can recover metadata but cannot recover key content or private-key password.

## Example Usage

```terraform
variable "client_key_password" {
  type      = string
  sensitive = true
}

resource "synthetics_create_client_certificate_v2" "mtls" {
  client_certificate {
    name        = "api-example-client-cert"
    description = "mTLS certificate for api.example.com"
    domain      = "api.example.com"

    public_key {
      content        = filebase64("${path.module}/client.crt")
      filename       = "client.crt"
      file_extension = "pem"
    }

    private_key {
      content        = filebase64("${path.module}/client.key")
      filename       = "client.key"
      file_extension = "pem"
      password       = var.client_key_password
    }
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `client_certificate` (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--client_certificate))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
